text: There is a peculiar quiet here. The open, modern space with its scattered bean bags and echo of emergency protocol feels almost clinical, but there is an unexpected invitation for contemplation amidst the spacious minimalism. A sense of waiting hovers, as if something is about to unfold, yet time moves slowly. I find myself torn between anticipation and a gentle uncertainty, acutely aware of the constructedness of this environment and my ambiguous place within it.
